mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM fin_payment
AND payment_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{paymentNo}, '%')
AND supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM fin_payment WHERE TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fin_payment WHERE payment_no LIKE CONCAT(#{dateStr}, '%')
